title: The Refugees Rehabilitation Finance Corporation (Repeal) Act, 1974
title_en: The Refugees Rehabilitation Finance Corporation (Repeal) Act, 1974
description: An Act to repeal the Refugees Rehabilitation Finance Corporation Ordinance, 1959, and to amend certain other law. WHEREAS it is expedient to repeal the Refugees Rehabilitation Finance Corporation Ordinance, 1959 (II of 1960), and to amend certain other law for the purpose hereinafter appearing; It is hereby enacted as follows:-

provisions.title: 1. Short title
provisions.content: 1. This Act may be called the Refugees Rehabilitation Finance Corporation (Repeal) Act, 1974 .

provisions.title: 2. Repeal and Savings
3. Amendment of Article 2, A.P.O. No. 3 of 1972
provisions.content: 3. In the Bangladesh (Administration of Financial Institutions) Order, 1972 (A.P.O. No. 3 of 1972), in Article 2, clause (b) shall be omitted.
